intent: Wide-shell 2BR / 1 bath SINGLE BATH with L-shape GREAT ROOM and mid-band HALL — 14x10 m lot, NO CARPORT. Envelope 10x6 = 60 m² floor. Master at front-left has direct door east into great room (no hall buffer). Standard at rear-left accesses public via hall in middle band. Common bath at rear-middle with wet-stack to kitchen at rear-right. Great room generously sized — spans front + middle of right column.
must_haves: master direct door to great room (no hall buffer)
single common bath publicly accessible from hall
wet-stack between common bath and kitchen
